original_query: SELECT "NAME" FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO", "NAME" FROM "DEPT" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 2 * "DEPTNO" AS "f0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY 2 * "DEPTNO") AS "t5" WHERE "DEPTNO" = "t5"."f0")) AS "t2"
rewritten_query: SELECT "NAME" FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO", "NAME" FROM "DEPT" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 2 * "DEPTNO" AS "f0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY 2 * "DEPTNO") AS "t5" WHERE "DEPTNO" = "t5"."f0")) AS "t2"
